nasb.text: A scoffer seeks wisdom and finds none, But knowledge is easy to one who has understanding.

esv.text: A scoffer seeks wisdom in vain, but knowledge is easy for a man of understanding.

cnv.text: 好譏笑人的尋找智慧，卻尋不著； 聰明人尋找知識，卻輕易得著。

ccb.text: 嘲讽者徒然寻智慧， 明哲人轻易得知识。

csbs.text: 讥讽者寻求智慧却得不到； 有悟性的人轻易得知识。
